headline: Salesforce announced the prepayment and initial share delivery under its massive $25 billion accelerated share repurchase agreements.
investor_impact: The execution of this $25 billion accelerated share repurchase (ASR) program will significantly reduce the outstanding share count, providing a strong accretive tailwind to EPS. This aggressive capital return strategy signals management's high conviction in the company's valuation and ongoing free cash flow generation.
key_figures: March 16, 2026 (prepayment and initial share delivery date)
